name: Caramel Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a bowl and crumble together well.
2. Press into an ungreased 8 x 8-inch pan and bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
3. Cool completely.
4. Melt the second amount of butter and corn syrup in a heavy saucepan.
5. Measure sugar into a cup and stir with gelatin until thoroughly mixed.
6. Add the mixture to the saucepan, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
7. Add condensed milk and continue stirring until boiling.
8. Boil for 4 minutes while constantly stirring; avoid burning when boiling.
9. Remove from heat and beat with a spoon until thickened and blobby.
10. Pour over the first layer, chill overnight, and invert onto plastic wrap.
11. Cut into 25 squares.
